title: helichrysum beckleri
intro: Helichrysum beckleri, also known as the Australian curry plant, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum beckleri include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
